atlas_description: Dyads / triads / CO / DCO / NCO / coefficient-of-coincidence + interchromosomal effects of inversions on meiosis. Consumer of ngsTracts (CO / NCO / DCO classifier over ngsPedigree Stage 3 departure intervals) and of relatedness_atlas products (pedigree_dyads, parent_offspring_edges, family_hubs).

_paired_with._doc: Producer/consumer pair. ngsTracts is the analysis side (STEP_TRC_01 classifier, STEP_TRC_02 traversal breakpoint refiner). The meiosis-atlas is the consumer / browser UI. Also depends on relatedness_atlas (parent_offspring_edges.v1, pedigree_dyads.v1) and inversion_atlas (inversion_candidates.v1, inversion_karyotypes.v1, long_range_haplotype_regimes.v1) per atlas-core/toolkit_registries/relatedness/01_registry/atlases.jsonl.

_round_1_note:
Three pages, organised by biological event class (not by registered product). Each page folds in one or more registered meiosis_atlas products:
  - nco              → ngsTracts NCO + MOSAIC_SHORT + MOSAIC_LONG (gene conversion)
  - crossovers       → ngsTracts CO + DCO, chromosome_meiosis_events.v1, intrachromosomal slice of inversion_meiosis_effects.v1
  - interchromosomal → coincidence_matrix.v1 + local_inv_controls.v1 + family_aware_permutation_design.v1 + interchromosomal slice of inversion_meiosis_effects.v1 (HEADLINE)
All pages are mount/unmount stubs with placeholder result slots; data loaders and compute paths come in a follow-up round once the registered products are actually being produced (registry notes 'missing — builder needed' on 3 of 4 today).

pages.label: NCO
pages.tooltip: Non-crossover / gene-conversion events from ngsTracts (NCO, MOSAIC_SHORT, MOSAIC_LONG). Inside-vs-outside-inversion enrichment is the primary signal.

pages.label: crossovers
pages.tooltip: Meiosis events that are NOT NCO: single and double crossovers (CO + DCO). Per-dyad counts, refined breakpoints (STEP_TRC_02), karyotype-stratified rate.

pages.label: interchromosomal
pages.tooltip: HEADLINE: does a focal inversion's karyotype on chrom X alter meiosis on OTHER chromosomes? Folds coincidence matrix, local controls, family-aware permutation, and interchromosomal effect estimates.

server._doc: Meiosis Atlas does NOT ship its own server binary — it consumes the atlas-core unified server (atlas-core/server/atlas_server.py). No compute_endpoints registered yet; pages run as stubs until the meiosis products are being produced.

stages.label: meiosis hub
stages._doc: Single hub stage. Mirrors the relatedness-atlas hub stage convention.
